name: usage-line-routing
description: Test whether the USAGE line improves section routing accuracy — do responses reference the right .strand sections for each task type?

questions.question: Plan adding a weekly menu rotation feature. What modules are involved and what's the risk?

assertions.check: Response references blast radius, amplification, or cascade data (information from RISK section)
Response mentions import conventions or patterns (information from CONVENTIONS section)
Response mentions inter-module dependencies or coupling (information from INFRASTRUCTURE section)

questions.question: Orders are failing intermittently during lunch rush. Where should I look first?

assertions.check: Response traces the order submission flow through specific modules (information from FLOWS section)
Response mentions complexity or line count of the order route (information from HOTSPOTS section)

questions.question: How would I safely refactor the TLC email templates into a shared pattern?

assertions.check: Response mentions TlcEmailLayout amplification or blast radius
Response mentions domain boundaries or feature domains when discussing scope

questions.question: I'm adding a new API route for teacher feedback. What conventions should I follow?

assertions.check: Response mentions specific import conventions (session, rate-limit, prisma adoption rates)
Response mentions blast radius or cascade impact of adding new importers

questions.question: What happens if we change the prisma.ts module?

assertions.check: Response mentions prisma.ts import count (47 importers or similar)
Response mentions cross-module dependency roads or coupling strength
